name: Northern Blot

components.name: 1. RNA 提取 + 定量 (5–30 µg total RNA)
2. 变性琼脂糖凝胶（1.2% + 甲醛）
3. RNA 变性：65°C 15 min + 冰上
6. 毛细转印至尼龙膜 (过夜, 20× SSC)
8. 预杂交 (42°C, 1 h)
components.note: 含 50% 甲酰胺的杂交液

components.name: 9. 杂交 (探针 + 杂交液, 42°C 过夜)
components.note: DIG 标记或 ³²P 标记探针

components.name: 10. 低严格洗涤 (2× SSC/0.1% SDS, RT, 2×5 min)
12. 检测（放射自显影 / DIG 化学发光）

notes.en: Use RNase-free reagents and equipment throughout. Run formaldehyde gel in fume hood. DIG-labeled probes are safer than radioactive, slightly less sensitive. Positive control: housekeeping gene (GAPDH, β-actin). RNA quality assessed by 28S/18S ratio (~2:1).
notes.zh: 所有操作使用 RNase-free 试剂和器具。甲醛凝胶在通风橱中操作。DIG 标记探针比放射性标记更安全，灵敏度稍低。阳性对照：管家基因（GAPDH, β-actin）。RNA 质量可通过 28S/18S 比值（~2:1）评估。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, Ch. 7; Alwine et al. (1977) PNAS 74:5350

usage.en: Detect specific RNA transcripts by size separation on denaturing gel, membrane transfer, and hybridization.
usage.zh: Northern blot 检测特定 RNA 转录本：变性胶分离、转膜、杂交。

briefSteps.en: Extract and quantify total RNA (5–30 µg) → denature RNA at 65°C with formaldehyde loading dye → separate on 1.2% formaldehyde-agarose gel (5 V/cm, 2–3 h) → equilibrate gel in 20× SSC → capillary transfer to positively-charged nylon membrane overnight → UV crosslink (120 mJ/cm²) → pre-hybridize at 42°C (1 h) → hybridize with labeled probe overnight at 42°C → low-then-high stringency washes → detect by phosphorimager or chemiluminescence
briefSteps.zh: 提取总 RNA 并定量（5–30 µg）→ 65°C 甲醛上样液变性 → 1.2% 甲醛琼脂糖凝胶分离（5 V/cm，2–3 h）→ 20× SSC 平衡凝胶 → 毛细虹吸转膜至带正电尼龙膜（过夜）→ UV 交联（120 mJ/cm²）→ 42°C 预杂交 1 h → 42°C 标记探针杂交过夜 → 低严格至高严格洗涤 → 磷光成像或化学发光检测

detailedSteps.en: Extract total RNA using TRIzol or RNeasy kit; quantify by NanoDrop (A260/280 ≥ 2.0) and assess integrity on a formaldehyde gel or Bioanalyzer (RIN ≥ 7). Use 5–30 µg per lane. All work must be RNase-free.
detailedSteps.zh: TRIzol 或 RNeasy 提取总 RNA；NanoDrop 定量（A260/280 ≥ 2.0），甲醛凝胶或 Bioanalyzer 评估完整性（RIN ≥ 7）。每泳道 5–30 µg。全程 RNase-free 操作。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare 1.2% formaldehyde-agarose gel: dissolve 1.2 g agarose in 72 mL DEPC-water, cool to 65°C, add 10 mL 10× MOPS buffer and 18 mL 37% formaldehyde. Pour in fume hood; allow to set 30–45 min. Run in 1× MOPS buffer.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备 1.2% 甲醛琼脂糖凝胶：1.2 g 琼脂糖溶于 72 mL DEPC 水，冷却至 65°C，加入 10 mL 10× MOPS 缓冲液和 18 mL 37% 甲醛，在通风橱中倒胶，凝固 30–45 min。使用 1× MOPS 电泳。

detailedSteps.en: Denature RNA samples: mix RNA with 2× RNA loading dye containing formaldehyde (50% deionized formamide, 7% formaldehyde, 1× MOPS); heat at 65°C for 15 min, then immediately chill on ice for 2 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 变性 RNA：将 RNA 与含甲醛的 2× RNA 上样缓冲液混合（50% 去离子甲酰胺、7% 甲醛、1× MOPS），65°C 加热 15 min，立即冰上冷却 2 min。

detailedSteps.en: Load samples and RNA size ladder; electrophorese at 5 V/cm (typically 80–100 V for a 20 cm gel) for 2–3 h in 1× MOPS buffer. Run in fume hood due to formaldehyde. 28S and 18S rRNA bands should be visible by EtBr or SYBR Gold staining (~4.7 and 1.9 kb).
detailedSteps.zh: 上样及 RNA 分子量标准；在 1× MOPS 缓冲液中 5 V/cm（约 80–100 V）电泳 2–3 h。操作在通风橱中进行。EtBr 或 SYBR Gold 染色可见 28S 和 18S rRNA 条带（约 4.7 kb 和 1.9 kb）。

detailedSteps.en: Equilibrate gel 2× in 20× SSC for 10 min each at RT to remove formaldehyde before transfer.
detailedSteps.zh: 将凝胶在 20× SSC 中平衡 2 次，每次 10 min，去除甲醛后再转膜。

detailedSteps.en: Assemble capillary transfer stack: paper wick soaked in 20× SSC → gel (inverted) → positively-charged nylon membrane → 3 layers Whatman 3MM paper → paper towels → weight. Transfer overnight (~16 h) in 20× SSC. Alternatively, use vacuum blotter (1–2 h at 50 mbar).
detailedSteps.zh: 组装毛细虹吸转移装置：浸 20× SSC 的滤纸桥 → 凝胶（倒置）→ 带正电尼龙膜 → 3 层 Whatman 3MM 滤纸 → 纸巾 → 重物。20× SSC 中过夜转移（约 16 h）。也可用真空转印仪（50 mbar，1–2 h）。

detailedSteps.en: After transfer, mark orientation on membrane with pencil. UV-crosslink RNA to membrane in Stratalinker at 120 mJ/cm² (auto-crosslink setting) or bake at 80°C for 2 h. Store dry membrane at RT until hybridization.
detailedSteps.zh: 转膜后用铅笔在膜上标记方向。Stratalinker 120 mJ/cm² UV 交联（自动交联程序），或 80°C 烘烤 2 h。干燥膜可室温保存待杂交。

detailedSteps.en: Pre-hybridize: wet membrane in 2× SSC, place in hybridization bottle with 10–20 mL pre-hybridization buffer (50% deionized formamide, 5× SSC, 5× Denhardt's, 0.5% SDS, 100 µg/mL salmon sperm DNA). Rotate at 42°C for 1 h.
detailedSteps.zh: 预杂交：用 2× SSC 润湿膜，放入杂交管，加 10–20 mL 预杂交液（50% 去离子甲酰胺、5× SSC、5× Denhardt's、0.5% SDS、100 µg/mL 鲑鱼精 DNA），42°C 旋转孵育 1 h。

detailedSteps.en: Add denatured labeled probe (DIG-labeled: 25–50 ng/mL; ³²P-labeled: 1–2 × 10⁶ cpm/mL) directly to hybridization bottle without replacing buffer. Hybridize at 42°C overnight (16–20 h) with rotation.
detailedSteps.zh: 将变性标记探针（DIG 标记：25–50 ng/mL；³²P 标记：1–2 × 10⁶ cpm/mL）直接加入杂交管（不换杂交液）。42°C 过夜旋转杂交（16–20 h）。

detailedSteps.en: Low-stringency washes: 2× in 2× SSC / 0.1% SDS, 5 min each at RT. High-stringency washes: 2× in 0.1× SSC / 0.1% SDS, 15 min each at 65°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 低严格洗涤：2× SSC / 0.1% SDS，室温洗涤 2 次，每次 5 min。高严格洗涤：0.1× SSC / 0.1% SDS，65°C 洗涤 2 次，每次 15 min。

detailedSteps.en: Detect signal: ³²P — wrap membrane in plastic wrap; expose to phosphorimager screen 1–16 h or X-ray film overnight at −80°C. DIG — perform anti-DIG-AP antibody incubation and chemiluminescence (CDP-Star) per manufacturer protocol; expose to film or image on chemiluminescent imager.
detailedSteps.zh: 信号检测：³²P——保鲜膜包裹，磷光成像板曝光 1–16 h 或 X 光胶片 −80°C 过夜。DIG——按说明书进行抗 DIG-AP 抗体孵育和化学发光检测（CDP-Star），感光胶片或化学发光成像仪检测。

note.en: UV-crosslinked membrane can be stored dry at RT for months before hybridization.
note.zh: UV 交联后的干燥膜可室温保存数月，待杂交。

note.en: After washing, the probed membrane can be wrapped in plastic wrap and stored at −20°C for 1–4 weeks before detection (³²P decays; DIG is more stable).
note.zh: 洗涤完毕后，已杂交的膜用保鲜膜包好，可 −20°C 保存 1–4 周再检测（³²P 会衰变；DIG 更稳定）。
